result.output: Axial contrast-enhanced CT image of the upper abdomen. It shows the liver, stomach, spleen, pancreas region, aorta, and vertebral body. There is a large, rounded, low-attenuation lesion in the left upper abdomen near the stomach/pancreatic region. No additional findings can be confidently described from this single image.
